# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextApiRequest, NextApiResponse } from 'next';

const streamResponse = async (req: NextApiRequest, res: NextApiResponse) => {
  if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') {
    return res.status(200).end();
  }

  const chunks: string[] = [];
  for await (const chunk of req.body) {
    chunks.push(chunk.toString());
  }
  const userProvidedContent = chunks.join('');

  try {
    const readableStream = new ReadableStream({
      pull(controller) {
        controller.enqueue(userProvidedContent);
        controller.close();
      },
    });

    res.writeHead(req.headers.get('status') || '200', req.headers);

    readableStream.pipeThrough(new TransformStream({ encoding: 'utf-8' })).pipeTo(res);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(error);
    return res.status(500).json({ message: 'Failed to stream response' });
  }
};

export default streamResponse;
